rawIntent: Add a health check endpoint to the Express application. Create src/app.ts that initialises an Express app, mounts GET /health returning json status ok, and exports the app. Create src/index.ts as the entry point that starts the server on port 3000.

successCriteria.description: The Express application has a health check endpoint at GET /health that returns a JSON response with status ok.
The server starts successfully on port 3000 without errors.

constraints: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Any other endpoints or features not mentioned in the intent.
Existing application logic unrelated to the health check.
Configuration files outside of src/app.ts and src/index.ts.
